docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PAUL NOUNOU'S MOTION FOR ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO POST SECURITY UNDER CCP 391 FOR STAY OF PROCEEDING AND FOR ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN A PRE-FILING ORDER IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 29, 2013 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 10, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND REPLY. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Pltf To Post Security Under Ccp 391 For Stya Of Proceeding And For Order Requiring Pltf To Obtain A Pre-Filing Order;
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amanad Ebey, Esq., (415-989-8070) for Paul Nounou, Plaintiff and moving party.
Michael Younessian, (415-879-1234) Defendant and opposing party in Pro Per.
Roni Rotholz, Esq, (925-932-0193) assissting Plaintiff.

Roni Rotholz's oral request to substitute in is Denied.

Argued. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT PAUL NOUNOU Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Post Security Under Ccp 391 For Stay Of Proceeding And For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Obtain A Pre-Filing Order is GRANTED. (see scanned order for details) Plaintiff is required to post a security in the amount of $5,000 within 20 days of the date of entry of this order and this matter shall be stayed the proceeding until resolution of this motion. Order is signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Pltf To Post Security Under Ccp 391 For Stya Of Proceeding And For Order Requiring Pltf To Obtain A Pre-Filing Order;
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Continued To Oct-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PAUL NOUNOU'S Motion For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Post Security Under CCP 391 For Stay Of Proceeding And For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Obtain A Pre-Filing Order IS Continued to October 29, 2013 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 10, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
